declarations.comments:
Duration in milliseconds, bounded to reasonable animation lengths.
Maximum duration: 10 minutes (600000ms) — sufficient for any UI animation.
Minimum duration: 0ms (instant).
declarations.title: Milliseconds

declarations.comments:
Progress through an animation, normalized to [0, 1].
This is the fundamental bounded time unit.
0.0 = animation start
1.0 = animation end
Values outside [0,1] are clamped by normalizeProgress.
declarations.title: Progress

declarations.comments:
Clamp progress to valid range [0, 1].
This ensures all animation calculations operate on bounded values.
declarations.title: normalizeProgress

children.comments:
Manual Eq instance because Custom contains a function type.
Custom easings are never considered equal (functions aren't comparable).
children.title: <anonymous>

declarations.comments:
Easing algebraic data type.
Each constructor represents a different time-warping function.
declarations.title: Easing

declarations.comments:
Easing function type: Progress → Progress.
Transforms linear time into curved time.
Must satisfy: f(0) = 0, f(1) = 1 (boundary preservation).
declarations.title: EasingFunction

declarations.comments:
Apply easing function to progress.
Pure function: same progress + same easing = same output.
declarations.title: applyEasing

declarations.comments:
Spring physics configuration.
All parameters are bounded to physically meaningful ranges.
declarations.title: SpringConfig

declarations.comments:
Cubic bezier control points for custom easing.
P0 = (0, 0), P3 = (1, 1) are fixed.
P1 and P2 are the control points we specify.
declarations.title: BezierCurve

children.comments:
Transform composition is matrix multiplication.
This is associative but NOT commutative.
children.title: <anonymous>

declarations.comments:
2D affine transform represented as a 3x3 matrix (6 values).
[ a c e ]
[ b d f ]
[ 0 0 1 ]
declarations.title: Transform2D

declarations.comments:
3D transform for perspective and rotation.
Represented as a 4x4 matrix (16 values).
declarations.title: Transform3D

declarations.comments: Transform origin point for rotations and scaling.
declarations.title: TransformOrigin

children.comments:
Opacity composes multiplicatively.
This models layered transparency: 0.5 * 0.5 = 0.25.
children.title: <anonymous>

declarations.comments: Opacity value, bounded [0, 1].
declarations.title: Opacity

children.comments:
Apply: parallel composition with matching durations.
Takes the longer duration, runs both animations in parallel.
children.title: <anonymous>

children.comments: Applicative: lift a pure value into a zero-duration animation.
children.title: <anonymous>

children.comments:
Semigroup: sequential composition.
a <> b means "first a, then b".
children.title: <anonymous>

children.comments: Monoid: empty animation (zero duration, identity value).
children.title: <anonymous>

declarations.comments:
Complete animation with duration, easing, and value function.
This is the primary type for defining animations.
declarations.title: Animation

declarations.comments:
Core animation functor: Progress → a
An animation is a function from normalized time to a value.
declarations.title: AnimationF

declarations.comments: Run an animation at a specific progress point.
declarations.title: runAnimation

declarations.comments: Get the duration of an animation.
declarations.title: duration

declarations.comments:
Sequential composition: run a1 then a2.
Time is remapped: [0, 0.5) → a1, [0.5, 1] → a2 (proportionally).
declarations.title: sequential

declarations.comments:
Parallel composition: run a1 and a2 simultaneously.
Total duration is max of both. Values are combined via Semigroup.
declarations.title: parallel

declarations.comments:
Stagger an array of animations.
Each animation starts after a delay relative to the previous one.
declarations.title: stagger

declarations.comments: Add a delay before an animation.
declarations.title: delay

declarations.comments:
Scale the time of an animation (speed up or slow down).
factor > 1 = faster, factor < 1 = slower.
declarations.title: timeScale

declarations.comments: Reverse an animation (play backwards).
declarations.title: reverse

declarations.comments: Ping-pong: play forward then backward.
declarations.title: pingPong

declarations.comments: Repeat an animation n times.
declarations.title: repeat

declarations.comments: Stagger pattern determines delay for each element.
declarations.title: StaggerPattern

declarations.comments: Direction for linear stagger patterns.
declarations.title: StaggerDirection

declarations.comments: Apply stagger pattern to get delay for element at index.
declarations.title: applyStagger

declarations.comments: Translate along X axis.
declarations.title: translateX

declarations.comments: Translate along Y axis.
declarations.title: translateY

declarations.comments: Translate in 2D.
declarations.title: translate

declarations.comments: Uniform scale animation.
declarations.title: scale

declarations.comments: Non-uniform scale animation.
declarations.title: scaleXY

declarations.comments: 2D rotation animation (radians).
declarations.title: rotate

declarations.comments: 3D rotation animation around arbitrary axis.
declarations.title: rotate3D

declarations.comments: Skew along X axis.
declarations.title: skewX

declarations.comments: Skew along Y axis.
declarations.title: skewY

declarations.comments: Opacity fade animation.
declarations.title: opacity

declarations.comments: A point in 2D space.
declarations.title: Point2D

declarations.comments: Path segment types for bezier paths.
declarations.title: PathSegment

declarations.comments: A complete animation path.
declarations.title: AnimationPath

declarations.comments:
Animate an element following a path.
Returns the position along the path at each progress point.
declarations.title: followPath

declarations.comments:
Morph between two paths.
Both paths must have the same structure (same number/types of segments).
declarations.title: morphPath

declarations.comments: What can be animated in typography.
declarations.title: AnimationTarget

declarations.comments: Selector for which elements to animate.
declarations.title: TargetSelector

declarations.comments: Create a targeted animation that applies to specific characters/words.
declarations.title: targeted
